stage4_output.text: You may opt out of this tracking at any time by activating the “Do Not Track” setting in your browser.
stage4_output.object: out of this tracking at any time by activating the “Do Not Track” setting in your browser.
stage4_output.manner: by activating the “Do Not Track” setting in your browser

stage4_output.text: Embedded content from other websites: Articles on the Website may include embedded content (e.g. videos, charts, etc.).
Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor had visited the other website.
stage4_output.manner: as if the visitor had visited the other website
stage4_output.condition: if the visitor had visited the other website

stage4_output.text: These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracing your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.
stage4_output.object: data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracing your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.
stage4_output.condition: if you have an account and are logged in to that website

stage4_output.text: Regarding your rights pertaining your data, if you have left comments on the Website, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you.
stage4_output.object: to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you.
stage4_output.condition: if you have left comments on the Website

stage4_output.text: We will respond to all data access requests within a standard period of 90 days.
stage4_output.object: to all data access requests within a standard period of 90 days.

stage4_output.text: Data portability requests will be fulfilled exclusively by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address.
stage4_output.object: exclusively by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address.
stage4_output.temporal: by printing your data on physical
stage4_output.manner: by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address
